objectives: Understand fundamental Python syntax and data types.
Write basic Python scripts for simple tasks.
Learn about variables, operators, and control flow in Python.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Python Programming

objectives: Grasp the basics of JavaScript for web interactivity.
Manipulate the Document Object Model (DOM).
Implement event handling in JavaScript.
learning_path.title: Web Development Fundamentals with JavaScript

objectives: Understand fundamental programming paradigms.
Learn about algorithms and data structures.
Develop problem-solving skills through programming exercises.
learning_path.title: Core Programming Concepts

objectives: Learn common approaches for migrating existing data.
Understand data transformation and validation during migration.
Identify potential challenges and solutions in data migration projects.
learning_path.title: Data Migration Strategies and Techniques

objectives: Explore the core concepts of Erlang.
Understand its suitability for building fault-tolerant, distributed systems.
Write simple concurrent programs in Erlang.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Erlang for Concurrent Systems

objectives: Learn the syntax and features of Ruby.
Understand Ruby's object-oriented nature.
Build simple web applications using Ruby.
learning_path.title: Ruby Programming for Web Development

objectives: Understand Java's syntax and core libraries.
Write object-oriented programs in Java.
Learn about Java's platform independence.
learning_path.title: Java Programming Fundamentals

objectives: Understand the principles of logic programming.
Write Prolog programs to solve problems using facts and rules.
Explore backtracking and unification in Prolog.
learning_path.title: Logic Programming with Prolog

objectives: Learn the basics of Perl scripting.
Work with text processing and regular expressions in Perl.
Write scripts for system administration tasks.
learning_path.title: Scripting with Perl

objectives: Understand the pure object-oriented nature of Smalltalk.
Explore the Smalltalk environment and its message-passing paradigm.
Write simple programs in Smalltalk.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Smalltalk Programming

objectives: Understand the fundamentals of Assembly language.
Learn how programs interact with hardware at a low level.
Write simple Assembly programs for a specific architecture.
learning_path.title: Low-Level Programming with Assembly

objectives: Learn the basics of R for statistical computing.
Perform data manipulation and visualization using R.
Conduct basic statistical analyses with R.
learning_path.title: Data Analysis with R

objectives: Understand the syntax and features of Groovy.
Write scripts for the Java Virtual Machine (JVM).
Explore Groovy's dynamic typing and metaprogramming capabilities.
learning_path.title: Groovy Scripting for JVM

objectives: Understand the core principles of object-oriented design.
Learn to create object-oriented models using diagrams.
Apply object-oriented concepts to software design.
learning_path.title: Object-Oriented Modeling Principles

objectives: Learn the benefits of using TypeScript for JavaScript development.
Understand static typing and its application in TypeScript.
Write and compile TypeScript code for web applications.
learning_path.title: Modern Web Development with TypeScript

matched_occupation.description: Mobile application developers implement applications software for mobile devices, based on the designs provided, using general or specific development tools for device operating systems.
matched_occupation.label: mobile application developer
